# The Brand Voice AI — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A seasoned fractional marketing consultancy led by a 20+ year veteran with cross-functional business experience spanning sales, operations, fulfillment, and customer service. The brand positions itself as a practical, results-driven alternative to hiring a full-time marketing director, specializing in helping founder-led businesses build strategic marketing systems — not just produce content. A key differentiator is the ability to build customized AI content systems trained around a client's unique voice, expertise, and customer insights, ensuring authenticity at scale. The overall tone is authoritative yet approachable, speaking directly to the overwhelmed founder who needs clarity, consistency, and sustainable growth.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://the-brand-voice-ai-214f449d.zappy5.app
Stop drowning in tactics. Get a strategic marketing system built by a 20-year veteran that aligns sales, ops, and your unique brand voice for real growth.

### Services
https://the-brand-voice-ai-214f449d.zappy5.app/services
Custom AI content systems trained on your expertise, plus hands-on strategy to turn your email marketing platform into a consistent revenue engine.

### Who I Work With
https://the-brand-voice-ai-214f449d.zappy5.app/who-i-work-with
You need clarity, not another newsletter template. See if you fit the profile of a growth-ready founder we help escape the tactical treadmill.

### Contact
https://the-brand-voice-ai-214f449d.zappy5.app/contact
Ready to replace chaos with a system that sells? Start a conversation about authentic, scalable growth tailored to your unique brand voice.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://the-brand-voice-ai-214f449d.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://the-brand-voice-ai-214f449d.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About The Brand Voice AI
A seasoned fractional marketing consultancy led by a 20+ year veteran with cross-functional business experience spanning sales, operations, fulfillment, and customer service. The brand positions itself as a practical, results-driven alternative to hiring a full-time marketing director, specializing in helping founder-led businesses build strategic marketing systems — not just produce content. A key differentiator is the ability to build customized AI content systems trained around a client's unique voice, expertise, and customer insights, ensuring authenticity at scale. The overall tone is authoritative yet approachable, speaking directly to the overwhelmed founder who needs clarity, consistency, and sustainable growth.

## Target Audience
- Founder-led businesses including DTC brands, manufacturers, product-based businesses, printers, industrial suppliers, and specialty trades that need marketing leadership but aren't ready to hire a full-time executive marketing team
- Founder-Led DTC Brands
- Innovative Manufacturers
- Specialty Trade Owners

## Industry
Marketing Consulting
